evals.prompt: 基于现有 rw_test.py 框架，给 buffered matrix 新增一组 read-then-append 非对齐测试，不要再在 shell 里写内嵌 Python。
evals.expected_output: The agent should edit rw_test.py as the provider, extend structured matrix case generation, keep wrappers thin, and validate with local smoke commands.

evals.prompt: 帮我给 mmap 测试新增一个跨 folio 的双写场景，并让 mkwrite_test.py 继续作为 trace 包装器。
evals.expected_output: The agent should implement the mmap case in rw_test.py, register it in the builtin mmap case registry, and keep mkwrite_test.py as a thin trace-aware frontend.

evals.prompt: 直接用这套 rw 测试框架在 /tmp 跑一个最小 smoke，验证 wp_subpage 的 mmap-case 和一个 overwrite matrix case。
evals.expected_output: The agent should use rw_test.py mmap-case and rw_test.py matrix, not invent new scripts, and should report local validation commands and any environment limitations.
